summary: 10 film announcements, 8 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Lou Gehrig Film
film.talent: Glen Powell, Richard Linklater (director), Lorne Michaels (producer)
film.announcement: Glen Powell and Richard Linklater reunite for a Lou Gehrig biopic at Universal with Lorne Michaels producing.

film.title: Gods Don't Give Gifts
film.announcement: AI YouTuber Gossip Goblin's feature film is poised to move from YouTube to theatrical release.

film.title: A Great Depression
film.talent: Paul Sparks, Kate Burton, Xander Berkeley, Rhys Coiro
film.announcement: Indie movie wraps filming in New Jersey with an ensemble cast including Paul Sparks and Kate Burton.

film.title: The Saviors
film.announcement: Vertical acquires North America distribution rights for SXSW thriller starring Adam Scott and Danielle Deadwyler.

film.title: Misty Green
film.talent: Chris Rock (director), Rosalind Eleazar, Adam Driver
film.announcement: Chris Rock directs A24 feature about a Hollywood actress fighting for her second act, starring Rosalind Eleazar and Adam Driver.

film.title: Company
film.talent: Casey Affleck (director), Nick Nolte, Adelaide Clemens, Ben Mendelsohn, Scoot McNairy
film.announcement: Casey Affleck's gothic mystery film casts Nick Nolte, Adelaide Clemens, Ben Mendelsohn, and Scoot McNairy.

film.title: I Plant My Hand in the Garden
film.announcement: Square Eyes acquires film ahead of world premiere at Venice Days festival.

film.title: Echo
film.announcement: Joel Courtney stars in and produces thriller directed by TikTok creator Zac Stracener in his feature directorial debut.

film.title: The Girl in the River
film.announcement: Thriller starring Tiffany Haddish and Devon Sawa receives late summer release date and trailer.

film.title: Stuffed
film.announcement: Jodie Comer and Harry Melling's taxidermy musical opens Toronto International Film Festival Discovery program.

tv.title: Mt. Mystic
tv.announcement: Johnny Knoxville joins comedy series cast.

tv.title: Peculiar Stars
tv.announcement: Apple TV+ lands adaptation rights to Rebecca Yarros' upcoming novel from Fourth Wing author.

tv.title: Chicks
tv.talent: Ellen Pompeo, Jodie Whittaker, Louis Cancelmi
tv.announcement: Louis Cancelmi joins Ellen Pompeo and Jodie Whittaker in Hulu dramedy pilot.

tv.title: Dracula
tv.talent: Jonathan Bailey, Ella Purnell, Aimee Lou Wood, Maggie Gyllenhaal, Omar Sy, Deva Cassel, Riccardo Scamarcio
tv.announcement: Audible announces cast for audio adaptation with Jonathan Bailey, Ella Purnell, Aimee Lou Wood, and Maggie Gyllenhaal for English version and international talent for other versions.

tv.title: Stillwater
tv.announcement: Prime Video orders series from Greg Berlanti and Carly Wray based on Skybound graphic novel.

tv.title: Terminal Crew of Dudes
tv.announcement: Whitmer Thomas stars in HBO comedy special combining singing, skating, and stand-up.

tv.title: Sentimiento Louco
tv.announcement: Prime Video sets launch plans for Marília Mendonça documentary.

tv.title: Romeo & Juliet, Reimagined
tv.announcement: BuzzFeed Studios and MuVPix announce 100-title microdrama production pact starting with Romeo & Juliet reimagining.
